#### PR Title Format:
- Capital first letter
- Imperative mood
- No issue number (linked in body)
- No trailing period

#### PR Body Format:

```markdown
## Summary
<Why is this PR needed?>

## Changes
- <change 1>
-

## Testing
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Build succeeds

## Notes for Reviewer
- <note 1>
-

## Related Issues
Closes #<issue-number>
```
